HYPNOSISCREATOR-HC_DEFEND.title: Defend
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLEASURE_CYCLE.title: Pleasure Cycle
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLEASURE_CYCLE.descripti: Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom. If the target is Tranced, apply {Doom:diff()} Doom again.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FINGER_SNAP.title: Finger Snap
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HARMONY.title: Harmony
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HARMONY.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the enemy's attack.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MIRRORING.title: Mirroring
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MIRRORING.description: Perform the same attack the enemy intends to use.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STUN_GUN.title: Stun Gun
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SAY_YOURE_SORRY.title: Say You're Sorry?
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WRIST_CUT.title: Wrist Cut
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BEGINNER_HYPNOSIS.title: Beginner Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BEGINNER_HYPNOSIS.descri: [gold]Count[/gold]. Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom. Plant fetishes from the next {PlantCards:diff()} Fetish card(s) played on the target. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DEEP_BREATH.title: Deep Breath
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PREFINGER.title: Foreplay
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY3000.title: Sensitivity x3000
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY3000.descript:
Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
This turn, the enemy takes triple damage.
[gold]Always hits Fetish[/gold] (SM, DomSub, Abnormal).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL.title: Breath Control
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL.descripti:
This turn, whenever you play a card, the target loses 1 Strength.
If their attack value is 0, [gold]Stun[/gold] them.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_OUT.title: Zero Out
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_OUT.description: [gold]Count.[/gold] Set their attack value to 0. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DRUG_HYPNOSIS.title: Drug Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DRUG_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: [gold]Count.[/gold] Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} Poison, {Doom:diff()} Doom, {StrengthLoss:diff()} less Strength, {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable, {WeakPower:diff()} Weak, {Bog:diff()} Bog, and {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPANKING.title: Spanking
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPANKING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
If Fetish hits, play this card again.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-METRONOME_CARD.title: Metronome
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GAZE_LIGHT.title: Gaze Light
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DISCIPLINE.title: Discipline
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STARE.title: Stare
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KICK.title: Kick
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Awaken SM and DomSub.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PETTING.title: Petting
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.title: Whisper
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} Fetish card(s) from your draw pile. Awaken their fetishes on the target. Exhaust.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to awaken fetishes from.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFT_TECHNIQUE.title: Soft Technique
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DONT_MOVE.title: Don't Move!
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GOOD.title: Good!
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GOOD.description: Good girl. Choose 1 Exhausted card and put it into your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GOOD.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to put into your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNEEL.title: Kneel
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LOOK.title: Look
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COME.title: Come
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COME.description: Pull the target and awaken DomSub.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RELAX.title: Relax
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PRESENT.title: Present
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE.title: Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CRAWL.title: Crawl
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ROLL.title: Roll
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CUM.title: Cum
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_INTRO.title: Hypnosis Intro
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_INTRO.descripti: Draw {Draw:diff()} cards. Each time you play this on the same enemy, draw 1 fewer. (Currently draws {CurrentDraw:diff()}.)
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CONTINUOUS_TRANCE.title: Continuous Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CONTINUOUS_TRANCE.descri: Apply 1 Trance 3 times and add Trance to their fetishes.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABDOMINAL_STRIKE.title: Abdominal Strike
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TINGSHA.title: Tingsha
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TINGSHA.description: The chime applies {Trance:diff()} Trance. Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FINGER_COUNT.title: Finger Count
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSE_SHARE.title: Sense Share
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CAN_DO_IT.title: You Can Do It
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MENTAL_CARE.title: Mental Care
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MENTAL_CARE.description: Remove all debuffs except Doom from target. Gain {BlockPerType:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] per debuff type removed. Apply {BogPower:diff()} Bog.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PUNISHMENT.title: Punishment
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PUNISHMENT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each time the target attacked you this combat.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ERICKSONIAN.title: Ericksonian Suggestion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ERICKSONIAN.description: Whenever a Fetish hit lands on the target, advance Count in hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-OVER_FOCUS.title: Over Focus
HYPNOSISCREATOR-OVER_FOCUS.description: Increase the target's fetish slots by {Slots:diff()} and awaken 1 random fetish.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BOTTOMLESS_BOG.title: Bottomless Bog
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RITUAL_REVEAL.title: Ritual Reveal
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RITUAL_REVEAL.descriptio: Awaken 1 random fetish on the target. Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_SHORTCUT.title: Zero Shortcut
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_SHORTCUT.descriptio: Gain 3 Block, then 2, then 1, then 0. Set the cost of [gold]Count[/gold] cards in your hand to 0. (Total {Block:diff()} Block)
HYPNOSISCREATOR-INFINITE_FINGER_SNAP.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 5 times. Do this X times. Exhaust.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_CHAMPION.title: Fetish Champion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_CHAMPION.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage once for each fetish the target has.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNOW_IT_ALL.title: I Know It All
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNOW_IT_ALL.description: For the rest of combat, increase Doom gained from fetish hits by {Multiplier:diff()}x (multiplicative).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TOTAL_CONTROL.title: Total Control
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TOTAL_CONTROL.descriptio:
Requires the target to have at least 3 Trance.
This turn, all attack damage is redirected to you.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_GOUGE.title: Heart Gouge
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_GOUGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Fatal, obtain a Heart relic.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BARE_INSTINCT.title: Bare Instinct
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BARE_INSTINCT.descriptio: At the start of your turn, enchant {Enchant:diff()} random Attack card(s) in your hand with Instinct.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-POLYNESIAN_HYPNOSIS.desc:
Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance to ALL enemies. Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom.
[gold]Count.[/gold]
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ASMR_HYPNOSIS.title: ASMR Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ASMR_HYPNOSIS.descriptio:
Assign players Left/Right. Whenever the active side alternates, apply {Doom:diff()} Doom to a random enemy.
Works solo by alternating with yourself.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SLIME_HYPNOSIS.title: Slime Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SLIME_HYPNOSIS.descripti: [gold]Count.[/gold] For 1 turn, overwrite the target's intent to add {Slimed:diff()} Slimed and replace appearance/name with a random slime. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COGNITIVE_SHUFFLE.title: Cognitive Shuffle
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COGNITIVE_SHUFFLE.descri:
[gold]Count.[/gold] Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance. Choose 1 of 3 Form cards and gain that Form.
While the target is Tranced, at the start of your turn add {Cards:diff()} random cards from that character (Ethereal, Exhaust, 0 cost this turn).
Void Form does not force-end your turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ALL_IN_ONE.title: All In One
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ALL_IN_ONE.description: [gold]Count.[/gold] Play every other [gold]Count[/gold] card from your draw pile, hand, and discard on the target. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
[gold]Count.[/gold] After {Turns:diff()} turns, their heart stops. Doubled against bosses. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TIME_STOP_STRIKE.title: Time Stop Strike
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TIME_STOP_STRIKE.descrip:
Playable only if the target is Tranced.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage at the end of your turn. Playable up to 3 times per turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_TRANSFORM.title: Invitation to Abnormal
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_TRANSFORM.descr: Choose up to X cards in your hand and transform them into random Abnormal-named cards from other characters. Those cards are treated as Abnormal cards. They cost 0 this turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_TRANSFORM.selec: Choose cards to transform (you may confirm with fewer than the maximum).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AMBUSH_HYPNOSIS.title: Ambush Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AMBUSH_HYPNOSIS.descript: Draw a card for each enemy, then automatically play each on a random enemy, ignoring their costs.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASS_HYPNOSIS.title: Mass Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASS_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: Whenever you play a single-target [gold]Count[/gold] card, also play its effect on every other enemy.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RAPPORT.title: Rapport
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RAPPORT.description: At the start of your turn, reduce the cost of [gold]Count[/gold] cards in your hand by 1 more. If you didn't attack an enemy last turn, reduce it by 1 more.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CATALEPSY.title: Catalepsy
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STATUS_HYPNOSIS.title: Status Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STATUS_HYPNOSIS.descript: Make status and curse cards easier to inflict on Tranced enemies.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LOVE_HYPNOSIS.title: Love-Love Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LOVE_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: [gold]Count.[/gold] If the enemy intends to Buff, change that buff's target to you. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CULT_LEADER.title: Cult Leader
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CULT_LEADER.description: SM, DomSub, and Abnormal Fetish cards always hit, regardless of the target's fetishes (not Trance). Whenever you apply Trance, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw {Draw:diff()} cards next turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNIFE_AND_GUN.title: Knife and Gun
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNIFE_AND_GUN.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add a Knife to your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BRAIN_SLIME_HYPNOSIS.des: [gold]Count.[/gold] This turn, redirect the target's attacks to another enemy (never the player). Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
[gold]Count.[/gold] Apply {ConstrictPower:diff()} Constrict. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance. At end of combat, obtain a Heart relic if this was applied.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BLOOD_SUCK_HYPNOSIS.desc: [gold]Count.[/gold] Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and heal for the same amount. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFTEN.title: Squishy Softening
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFTEN.description: Tranced enemies deal 20% less damage per stack of Trance they have.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LULLABY_HYPNOSIS.title: Lullaby Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LULLABY_HYPNOSIS.descrip: [gold]Count.[/gold] Apply {AsleepPower:diff()} Asleep. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASTERY.title: Mastery
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASTERY.description: At the end of combat, permanently upgrade every [gold]Count[/gold] card you played while this was active.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MELT_INTO_TRANCE.title: Melt Into Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MELT_INTO_TRANCE.descrip: Deal damage equal to {PerTrance:diff()} times the total Trance the target has ever lost.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CORROSION.title: Corrosion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CORROSION.description: Whenever you play an Attack, add a random Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] card to your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TENTACLE_RECALL.title: Tentacle Recall
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TENTACLE_RECALL.descript: Apply {ConstrictPower:diff()} Constrict. At the start of your next turn, add a copy of this card to your hand.
[gold]Count.[/gold] Lose {LoseHp:diff()} HP. Apply 1 Trance.
[gold]Can be upgraded infinitely; each upgrade increases HP loss by 7.[/gold]
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRAINING_COMMAND_CARD.de: Add {Cards:diff()} random Training Command cards to your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AUTOPSY.title: Autopsy
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AUTOPSY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal additional {PerHeart:diff()} damage for each Heart relic you have. If Fatal, gain an extra Heart relic. Exhaust.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HUNDRED_EIGHT.title: 108 Earthly Desires
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HUNDRED_EIGHT.descriptio:
Awaken every fetish on all enemies. After play, this card's cost increases by 1.
When you play this card at cost 3, deal {Damage:diff()} damage 108 times to all enemies and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
[gold]Always hits Fetish[/gold] (each type hits separately).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FUDO_MYOO.title: Fudo Myo-o
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FUDO_MYOO.description: Remove all debuffs from yourself. Gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} Artifact. Whenever an enemy applies a debuff to you, deal {FudoMyooPower:diff()} damage to them.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BABY_HYPNOSIS.title: Baby Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BABY_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: [gold]Count.[/gold] Remove all buffs from the target. Apply {ShrinkPower:diff()} Shrink and {WeakPower:diff()} Weak. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WORD_FLOOD.title: Word Flood
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WORD_FLOOD.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Count[/gold] card, draw {Draw:diff()} card.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUGGESTION_RELEASE.title: Suggestion Release
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUGGESTION_RELEASE.descr: Remove all Trance from the target and gain [gold]Energy[/gold] equal to the amount removed.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AS_YOU_WISH.title: As You Wish, Master
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AS_YOU_WISH.description: Whenever you play a Fetish card, gain a bonus based on its fetish: Abnormal grants Strength, SM grants Vigor, DomSub grants Block.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_UNDERSTANDING.des: Whenever you play a Fetish card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PROSELYTIZE.title: Proselytizing Urge
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PROSELYTIZE.description:
Apply {OshiActivityPower:diff()} Oshi Activity and {BogPower:diff()} Bog.
At the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} Gold as a reward. Exhaust.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SELF_SUGGESTION.title: Self-Suggestion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SELF_SUGGESTION.descript: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength and {DexterityPower:diff()} Dexterity. Obtain {Hearts:diff()} random enemy Heart relics you don't own (excluding hearts of current combat enemies). They trigger at combat start.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_CRAVING.title: Craving for Hearts
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_CRAVING.descriptio: All Heart relics you own become reusable this combat.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WAIT_A_BIT_MORE.title: Just a Little Longer
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WAIT_A_BIT_MORE.descript: Choose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Count[/gold] card(s) in your hand. Reset their cost to base and grant them [gold]Replay[/gold] 1.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MARSHMALLOW_ANSWER.title: Marshmallow Answer
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MARSHMALLOW_ANSWER.descr: Add {Cards:diff()} random curses to your hand. If an enemy intends to Attack, overwrite that move to gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {BogPower:diff()} Bog.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PERVERSION_TRUE_DESIRE.d: Deal damage equal to your missing HP.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COLLAR_TRAINING.title: Collar and Training
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COLLAR_TRAINING.descript: Pull the target. If they were already Pulled, apply {Doom:diff()} Doom and awaken DomSub.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-VITAL_POINT.title: Strike at the Vital Point
HYPNOSISCREATOR-VITAL_POINT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {PerTurn:diff()} for each turn since you last attacked an enemy.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ACCEPTANCE_NEED.title: Need for Acceptance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ACCEPTANCE_NEED.descript: Whenever you take attack damage, remember it. At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw cards equal to the number of hits taken.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MEET_EXPECTATIONS.title: Meeting Expectations
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MEET_EXPECTATIONS.descri:
Deal damage equal to the square of (total resolved cost of [gold]Count[/gold] cards in your hand + 1), then reduce their cost by 1.
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENCORE.title: Encore
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENCORE.description: Whenever a [gold]Count[/gold] card you played would Exhaust, it returns to your hand instead.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEARTBEAT_SHARE.title: Sharing a Heartbeat
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEARTBEAT_SHARE.descript: [gold]Multiplayer.[/gold] Share your Stolen Heart relics with one ally.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_PARTY.title: Fetish Party Night
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_PARTY.description: [gold]Multiplayer.[/gold] Add {Cards:diff()} random Fetish cards to every ally's hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FREE_HUG.title: Free Hug
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FREE_HUG.description: [gold]Multiplayer.[/gold] Pull the target. If they were already Pulled, apply {Doom:diff()} Doom and {BogPower:diff()} Bog, then pass {Cards:diff()} cards to a random ally.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNIFE.title: Knife
